posts.title: Morning Beach Run
posts.notes: Ran along the coast at sunrise. Salt air and sand — twice as hard but twice as beautiful.

comments.content: Beach running looks absolutely incredible!
So jealous, I need to do this someday!
Sand training is excellent for leg strength.

posts.title: Vinyasa Flow Class
posts.notes: Full vinyasa sequence with a great instructor. Really opened up my hips today.

comments.content: What studio do you go to?
This looks so calming, I need this in my life

posts.title: Lap Swimming
posts.notes: Back to the pool after a week off. 25 laps felt better than expected.

comments.content: Swimming looks so peaceful and meditative
Great to see you back in the pool!
Good endurance base building.

posts.title: Saturday Hike
posts.notes: Climbed 800m elevation today. Legs were burning but the views from the top were worth every step.

comments.content: Those views must be absolutely incredible!
800m elevation is serious work.
I NEED to join you next time!!

posts.title: Cycling Power Intervals
posts.notes: 5x5min power intervals. Legs are completely dead. Worth it.

comments.content: Respect for grinding through those intervals!
Interval work builds the engine.

posts.title: Yin Yoga Evening
posts.notes: Long holds, deep stretches. My body needed this more than I realised.

comments.content: Yin yoga is criminally underrated.
This is my kind of workout honestly

posts.title: Parkrun 5K PB Attempt
posts.notes: Missed my PB by just 4 seconds. I'm coming back for it next week!

comments.content: SO CLOSE!! You'll smash it next time!
4 seconds is nothing, you've got this!
Analyse the splits. Adjust pacing strategy.

posts.title: Open Water Swim
posts.notes: First open water swim of the year. Cold, wild, and exhilarating.

comments.content: You are so brave, I could never!!
Open water swimming is on my bucket list

posts.title: Archery Training
posts.notes: 300 arrows at 40m. Groupings are tightening. Every shot teaches you something.

comments.content: You are literally the coolest person I know
Archery is such a discipline, I'm in awe
I didn't know you did archery, this is amazing!

posts.title: Overhead Press PR
posts.notes: New shoulder press record at 135lbs. Steady, methodical progress.

comments.content: Incredible upper body strength!
That is seriously impressive Sova

posts.title: Cold Weather Run
posts.notes: -5 degrees this morning. Real training conditions. You adapt or you stay home.

comments.content: You're completely insane in the best way
Absolute respect for getting out in that cold!
How are you not frozen??

posts.title: Weighted Pull-ups
posts.notes: 5x5 with 20kg added weight. Back strength is at an all time high.

comments.content: Absolute beast, how?!
GOALS. I can barely do bodyweight ones
How long until you were doing weighted?

posts.title: Tactical Movement Drills
posts.notes: Agility, reaction time, precision drills. Staying sharp for whatever comes next.

comments.content: What does a tactical drill session even look like?
Sounds incredibly intense!

posts.title: Snow Run
posts.notes: 8km through fresh snow. Every step takes twice the effort. Every kilometre earns double.

comments.content: You make everything dramatic and incredible
Snow running is a completely different beast!

posts.title: Barbell Squat Day
posts.notes: Working up to 265lbs today. Form is solid, depth is good, numbers are moving.

comments.content: Legendary numbers, always
You make me want to get back under the bar!

posts.title: 5K Benchmark Run
posts.notes: Testing baseline fitness at the start of the training block. Numbers don't lie.

comments.content: What was the time? Don't leave us hanging!

posts.title: Sprint Training
posts.notes: 10x60m all-out sprints. Wind literally cannot catch me today. Fastest session yet.

comments.content: Fastest person alive, confirmed
Those splits must be absolutely insane
Good speed work. Keep the form clean.

posts.title: Knife Techniques Session
posts.notes: Blade work and quick draw drills. Precision and speed together is the whole point.

comments.content: Controlled and precise. Good.
You never cease to amaze me Jett

posts.title: Jump Rope HIIT
posts.notes: 10 rounds of 1min on, 30s off. Jump rope is criminally underrated as a training tool.

comments.content: Jump rope is SO underrated you're absolutely right!
Those calves must be incredible by now
Efficient. Portable. Effective training method.

posts.title: Seoul City Cycling
posts.notes: 20km through Seoul at dusk. Nothing beats this city when the lights come on.

comments.content: Seoul at dusk must be absolutely breathtaking!
I want to cycle Seoul so badly, looks amazing

posts.title: Morning Yoga Flow
posts.notes: Even sprinters need to stretch. My hamstrings finally stopped screaming at me.

comments.content: Yes!! Rest and recovery matters so much!
Mobility work is non-negotiable for sprinters.

posts.title: 100m Time Trial
posts.notes: Personal best. Not posting the time yet but I am absolutely grinning. Watch this space.

comments.content: The suspense is genuinely killing me, what was the time?!
TELL US THE TIME JETT!!!
Post the time.

posts.title: Plyometric Circuit
posts.notes: Box jumps, depth jumps, broad jumps. Pure explosive power session.

comments.content: Good explosive work. Quality over quantity.
You make everything look completely effortless

posts.title: Swim Recovery Session
posts.notes: Easy laps to flush out the legs after a heavy sprint week. Low intensity, high value.

comments.content: Smart to use swimming for recovery!
